title: scyphogyne capitata var. brevifolia
intro: Scyphogyne capitata var. brevifolia, also known as the Indian mulberry or white mulberry, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scyphogyne capitata var. brevifolia include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
